hero_subtitle: Digital revolution for Municipalities. Track everything from road cleaning to door-to-door collection live.
Digital revolution for Municipalities. Track everything from road cleaning to door-to-door collection live.
features_subtitle: Everything you need to manage a clean city.
feat_qr_desc: Unique QR code outside every home. 100% digital reporting for garbage collection.
feat_staff_desc: Real-time GPS tracking. See which staff is on which road, live.
feat_portal_desc: Complain via Nagrik app. Instant resolution with photo and location.
pricing_subtitle: Subscribe as per your city size. No hidden charges.
contact_desc: Need a software demo for Nagar Nigam or Nagar Panchayat? Contact us.
mission_desc: Saksham is not just a software; it's a digital movement to transform India's urban landscape. Our mission is to bridge the gap between technology and cleanliness. By providing real-time data to Nagar Nigams, we ensure that every street is swept, every garbage bag is collected, and every citizen's grievance is resolved instantly. Together, let's build a healthier and Swachh Bharat 2026.
about_vision_desc: To make every city self-reliant (Atmanirbhar) in waste management through 100% transparency.
